title: Fox Friend Remastered
description: An updated and upgraded version of the mod Fox Friend, originally by SuiKe, which allows you to tame foxes!
body:
**THIS MOD REQUIRES FABRIC API**

An updated and upgraded version of the mod Fox Friend, originally by SuiKe.

This mod allows you to tame foxes, making them your pet! They'll defend you, attack with you, and follow you, just like any other pet. 

Tamed foxes have a few new mechanics compared to regular, vanilla foxes that simply trust you:
- on top of defending you, they'll also attack with you
- you can make them wait by right-clicking them
- sneak + right-click on a fox with an item in its mouth makes it spit out the item
- they follow you around and teleport to you if you're too far away, even if they're in unloaded chunks!
- tamed foxes can regenerate, either by waiting, or by eating food you give them
- and more™!

Foxes can be tamed with a single sweet berry (though this might be subject to change in the future).
